kc:reference.kc:detail: IAEA-TECDOC-619 X-ray and gamma-ray standards for detector calibration Vienna, IAEA, 1991.
IAEA-TECDOC-619 X-ray and gamma-ray standards for detector calibration Vienna, IAEA, 1991.

kc:measurement.kc:description: Ionization chamber calibrated by 4pi(NaI(Tl)) gamma counting
Ionization chamber calibrated by 4pi(NaI(Tl)) gamma counting

kc:reference.kc:detail: IAEA-TECDOC-619 X-ray and gamma-ray standards for detector calibration Vienna, IAEA, 1991.

kc:measurement.kc:comments: A=2560(8)kBq is the weighted mean of the activities obtained by different methods taking into account correlations.
A=2560(8)kBq is the weighted mean of the activities obtained by different methods taking into account correlations.
